results.title: Text Section - Max Length Enforced (Required Text, 30-Char Limit)
results.notes: HTML maxlength=30 enforces limit. 30 chars accepted exactly ('Exactly thirty characters here'), 31st char 'X' rejected, 1 char 'A' accepted and add-to-cart succeeded.

results.title: Text Section - Whitespace-Only Input Does Not Satisfy Required Validation
results.notes: 5 spaces entered; add-to-cart blocked with error 'Section is required'. After clearing and typing 'Happy Birthday', add-to-cart succeeded.

results.title: Text Section - Optional Text Section Allows Empty and Non-Empty Values
results.notes: Gift Box product with optional text. Add-to-cart with 'None' selected succeeded (empty). Second add-to-cart with 'Congratulations on your new home!' succeeded. Cart shows text for filled item and no text for empty item.

results.title: Text Section - Long Text at 100-Char Boundary Preserved in Cart and Order

evidence.textValue: This gift message is exactly one hundred characters long. It tests the maximum length boundary okay!

results.notes: 100-char text accepted at boundary. 101st char 'X' rejected. Full 100-char text preserved in cart without truncation.

results.title: Text Section - Text Value Preserved Through Full Checkout to Order History
results.notes: Text 'With Love Always' preserved at all stages: PDP -> cart ('Selected text: With Love Always') -> checkout -> order confirmation (CO260413-00001) -> order history detail. Full end-to-end persistence verified.

results.title: Text Section - Paste-Bypass Triggers max_length_exceeded i18n Error and Backend Rejection
results.notes: Programmatic value-set via nativeInputValueSetter bypassed HTML maxlength=30 (input accepted 31 chars). Inline validation error 'Text must not exceed 30 characters' appeared immediately (PR #2235 frontend enforcement confirmed). Add-to-cart blocked by client-side validation (no addItem mutation fired). After clearing and typing valid 18-char text 'Engraved with Love', error cleared and add-to-cart succeeded. Note: CreateConfiguredLineItem mutation (price calc) was called with over-limit text but addItem was blocked.
